FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class SpanTextEl

Namespace
FluentGpu.Dsl
Assembly
FluentGpu.Dsl.dll

A rich-text PARAGRAPH of typed inline runs (rtb-01 — the WinUI TextBlock.Inlines/RichTextBlock paragraph model: Run/Bold/Hyperlink): the spans concatenate and shape as ONE flow (one wrap pass — a styled word never re-flows independently of its sentence). Per-span weight/size/family/color/underline/strikethrough overlay the base style here; a span with OnClick is a HYPERLINK — the engine resolves the Hand cursor over its laid rects and fires the action on click (RichTextBlock.cpp:2995 / TextBlock.cpp:3488 SetCursor(MouseCursorHand)); accent foreground + underline are the CALLER's styling (HyperlinkForeground, generic.xaml:1120-1122). No per-span italic: the shaper has no style axis yet (faces resolve by family+weight only).

public sealed record SpanTextEl : Element, IEquatable<Element>, IEquatable<SpanTextEl>
Inheritance
object
Element
SpanTextEl
Implements
IEquatable<Element>
IEquatable<SpanTextEl>

object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Constructors

SpanTextEl(TextSpan[])

A rich-text PARAGRAPH of typed inline runs (rtb-01 — the WinUI TextBlock.Inlines/RichTextBlock paragraph model: Run/Bold/Hyperlink): the spans concatenate and shape as ONE flow (one wrap pass — a styled word never re-flows independently of its sentence). Per-span weight/size/family/color/underline/strikethrough overlay the base style here; a span with OnClick is a HYPERLINK — the engine resolves the Hand cursor over its laid rects and fires the action on click (RichTextBlock.cpp:2995 / TextBlock.cpp:3488 SetCursor(MouseCursorHand)); accent foreground + underline are the CALLER's styling (HyperlinkForeground, generic.xaml:1120-1122). No per-span italic: the shaper has no style axis yet (faces resolve by family+weight only).

public SpanTextEl(TextSpan[] Spans)

Height 

public float Height { get; init; }

Property Value

float

IsTextSelectionEnabled

Read-only selection (rtb-02): drag selects across the whole paragraph flow, Ctrl+C copies. OPT-IN here (like WinUI TextBlock, TextBlock.cpp:583); the RichTextBlock control turns it on by default (IsTextSelectionEnabled=TRUE by default on CRichTextBlock, RichTextBlock.cpp:1730).

public bool IsTextSelectionEnabled { get; init; }

Property Value

bool

SelectionHighlightColor

Per-control selection highlight (api-04). A==0 = the engine/theme accent brush (TextSelectionManager.cpp:52-56).

Weight

Base numeric font weight (0 = Normal 400); spans override per range.

public ushort Weight { get; init; }

ushort

Width 

public float Width { get; init; }

Property Value

float

Wrap

Paragraphs WRAP by default — the WinUI BaseRichTextBlockStyle sets TextWrapping=Wrap (generic.xaml:13286-13295); pass NoWrap explicitly for a single-line run of spans.

public TextWrap Wrap { get; init; }

Property Value

TextWrap
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
